---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px;"}
# Rāg Tilak kāmod
:::


## Songs in this collection


- [Kauna rūpa bane](chapters/kauna_rupa_bane.qmd)

- [Prathama paravaradigāra](chapters/prathama.qmd)

- [śambhu hara pada](chapters/sambhu_hara_pada.qmd)
